metadata.description: An open marketplace of reusable AI-coding-agent workflows. Add with /plugin marketplace add alexandremorgado/ai-devkit, then /plugin install ai-devkit@ai-devkit.

plugins.name: ai-devkit
plugins.description: Reusable agent skills for the everyday dev loop — create-issue, issue-to-branch, smart-commit, ensure-tests, finish-branch and more, plus codex-buddy for a second-agent review. Discoverable in Claude Code and Codex; each skill ships an adapt-to-your-stack prompt.
